Avenity Business Solutions - Proof-Level AI Visibility Case Study

The Perfect Round: From No AI Overview Visibility to Three Documented AI Search Placements

A named-client authority case study documenting how Avenity helped an indoor golf and cocktail venue become more understandable and recommendable across multiple AI-driven buyer-intent searches.

Client: The Perfect RoundStart date: April 1, 2026Market: Conroe / North HoustonOutcome: 3 AI placements

Executive Proof Summary

The Perfect Round began working with Avenity Business Solutions on April 1, 2026. At the beginning of the engagement, The Perfect Round had no documented AI Overview visibility for the target discovery searches Avenity was focused on improving.

After Avenity's AI visibility work, The Perfect Round was documented in three AI-driven search placements tied to high-value commercial discovery: corporate event venue in Conroe, indoor golf / golf simulator in Conroe, and indoor golf bar.

Documented AI Visibility Outcomes

Corporate event venue in Conroe

The Perfect Round surfaced as an indoor golf + cocktails option for corporate events, team building, private parties, and group experiences.

Indoor golf / golf simulator in Conroe

The Perfect Round surfaced as a relevant indoor golf and golf simulator option in the Conroe market.

Indoor golf bar

The Perfect Round surfaced in AI-driven results connected to indoor golf, cocktails, simulator lounges, and social outings.
